_comment: An Experiment reviewed with --allow-experiments. The eval/Function/code-string-timer file checks (eval-call / function-constructor / string-timer) scan ONLY code outside the pure WebExtension tree: a WebExtension sandbox cannot execute these without a permissive CSP (reported separately by csp-unsafe-*), so the identical constructs in background.js are NOT flagged, while the privileged Experiment parent script - which has no CSP gate - IS flagged at each construct.
